characters.name: Simon
characters.description: Simon Simonis a one-off and minor character, appearing in the UK version of the TV series,Skins. He is shown in the episode, "Michelle" briefly as the boyfriend ofCassie Ainsworth. Simon is portrayed by actorJames Buckley. Simon revealed that his main traits are depression and self-loathing. When wanting something, he can become hopeful and will not give up, as evident when mentioning how he is still hopeful to convince Cassie and him to have more of a physical relationship.
